creator: jimmy@mammothcheese.ca
text:
Forgot to update plist.
New distfile.

diff -ruN /usr/ports/devel/libserver/Makefile ./libserver/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/devel/libserver/Makefile	2010-09-21 21:14:24.000000000 -0400
+++ ./libserver/Makefile	2010-09-25 18:44:54.000000000 -0400
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	libserver
-PORTVERSION=	1.0
+PORTVERSION=	1.1
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.mammothcheese.ca/
 
diff -ruN /usr/ports/devel/libserver/distinfo ./libserver/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/devel/libserver/distinfo	2010-09-21 21:14:24.000000000 -0400
+++ ./libserver/distinfo	2010-09-26 08:37:33.000000000 -0400
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (libserver-1.0.tar.gz) = dc9957e6b666f4a7b2cfaf2df6ade490
-SHA256 (libserver-1.0.tar.gz) = 9ad0dbf58c2f04175d3d2ac6bdd84fb361868ac74e8708ece466478899ec2dc6
-SIZE (libserver-1.0.tar.gz) = 8540
+MD5 (libserver-1.1.tar.gz) = 2f18a375446c3feb47531c68611669ee
+SHA256 (libserver-1.1.tar.gz) = 939e3f6690a2888f5ab1db56fea3668d44ccc9506168850bfcdfe0b73133b3c4
+SIZE (libserver-1.1.tar.gz) = 9077
diff -ruN /usr/ports/devel/libserver/pkg-plist ./libserver/pkg-plist
--- /usr/ports/devel/libserver/pkg-plist	2010-09-21 21:14:24.000000000 -0400
+++ ./libserver/pkg-plist	2010-09-26 08:37:30.000000000 -0400
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 include/server.h
 lib/libserver.so
-lib/libserver.so.1.0
+lib/libserver.so.1.1
